case_title: PERSOLVE LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA VS. ALHOMEDY ABDULLRAQEB et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ACCOUNT RESOLUTION ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT ABDULLRAQEB, ALHOMEDY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
